docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,562.40 FILED BY BACKS, JOCHEN AS TO DEFENDANT VARDY, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BACKS, JOCHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARDY, DAVID $2,562.40 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,687.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -$75- SERVED APR-03-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VARDY, DAVID
LETTER FROM ISSAC CRONIN RE: OEX
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BACKS, JOCHEN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VARDY, DAVID
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-14-2013 AS TO DEFENDANT VARDY, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2013 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-25-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ACCORDING TO THE PLAINTIFF HE HAS RECEIVED A WIRE TRANSFER FROM THE DEFENDANT AND IS WAITING FOR THE TRANSFER TO BE COMPLETED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WAS FILED ON 11/18/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT VARDY, DAVID HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (RE:ATTEMPTED SERVICE OF OEX ON SEPT-17-13 AT 07:07PM BY JPL PROCESS SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BACKS, JOCHEN AS TO DEFENDANT VARDY, DAVID
